mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shop_registry (name, plan, status, locale, primary_domain, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{plan}, #{status}, #{locale}, #{primaryDomain}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.name, s.plan, s.status, s.locale, s.primary_domain, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM shop_registry s JOIN shop_domain d ON d.shop_id = s.id WHERE d.host = #{host}
